vision.statement: Africa-focused founder command center — capital desk, growth desk, and visibility desk productized from the GTCX fundraising engine

mission: Ship Venture OS MVP app + collateral workflows so GTCX ecosystem repos are the first pilot clients with demoable founder journeys

northStarMetric.name: Pilot founder journey completion
northStarMetric.target: One end-to-end intake → collateral → visibility witness per pilot client Witness: audit/evidence/venture-pilot-journey-latest.json

goals.title: Venture OS MVP + GTCX pilot shell
goals.outcome: Next.js app routes green (lint/build); product-goals + PRD indexed; pilot client schema validated
goals.measure: One end-to-end intake → collateral → visibility witness per pilot client
